prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年理科最低位次约1105→929→1110，近三年波动较大，2024年明显前移（更易进）后2025年回弹至1100名附近；2025年基准约1110名；该校在新疆理科招生计划2023年16人，2024年增至18人，2025年维持18人；2026年计划20人，较2025年扩招约11%，扩招通常使位次数字增大（竞争略加剧）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中山大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第13名（Top20），近年排名稳定在11–13名之间，属国内顶尖高校梯队；20 26年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件通报及校园管理舆情，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；但2025年声誉偏正面，抖音热度排名第29（较热），整体关注度较高 。历史投档异常方面，2022–2024年曾出现断档信号，但2025年已有所恢复；中山大学拥有生态学A+、工商管理A+、临床医学A-、数学A、物理学A、生物学A、基 础医学A、药学A等23个A-及以上学科，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，中 山大学在上述领域均有强势学科布局；新疆2026年高考报名总人数约23.8万人（较2025年约7.65万大幅增长），虽为估算值但增幅显著，全省竞争加剧；中山大学位于广东广州，属华南地区顶尖高校，对新疆考生而言属于跨省报考，地域偏好上华南地区吸引力较强；该校在新疆招生计划占比较小（ 约20人），属典型的外省招生模式。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1110名、2026年扩招约11%、新疆考生总数大幅增长带来的竞争加剧、学校声誉偏负 面有一定抵消，以及优势学科吸引力强劲等因素，预计2026年理科最低位次较2025年小幅后移（更难进）。预测最低位次约1204名，区间1084–1324名。

- 柔性电子学。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science was approximately 1105 → 929 → 1110, with significant fluctuations in the past three years. In 2024, it moved forward significantly (easier to enter), then rebounded to around 1100 in 2025; the baseline for 2025 is about 1110. The university's enrollment plan for science in Xinjiang was 16 in 2023, increased to 18 in 2024, and remained at 18 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 20, an increase of about 11% compared to 2025. Expansion usually leads to a larger ranking number (slightly increased competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sun Yat-sen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It ranks 13th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top 20), with a stable ranking between 11th and 13th in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving reports of academic misconduct and campus management public opinion, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. However, in 2025, its reputation was relatively positive, with a Douyin popularity ranking of 29 (relatively hot), and overall attention is high. Regarding historical admission anomalies, there were signs of gaps from 2022 to 2024, but recovery was seen in 2025. Sun Yat-sen University has 23 A- or above disciplines, including Ecology A+, Business Administration A+, Clinical Medicine A-, Mathematics A, Physics A, Biology A, Basic Medicine A, and Pharmacy A, with strong disciplinary strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Clinical Medicine, Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, and Sun Yat-sen University has strong disciplinary layouts in these fields. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Xinjiang is about 238,000 (a significant increase from about 76,500 in 2025), though estimated, the increase is substantial, intensifying competition across the province. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a top university in South China. For Xinjiang candidates, it is a cross-province application, and the regional preference for South China is relatively strong. The university's enrollment plan in Xinjiang is small (about 20 people), typical of out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1110, the 2026 expansion of about 11%, the significant increase in the total number of Xinjiang candidates leading to intensified competition, the offsetting effect of the university's somewhat negative reputation, and the strong appeal of its advantageous disciplines, it is expected that the minimum ranking for science in 2026 will shift slightly backward (harder to enter). The predicted minimum ranking is about 1204, with a range of 1084–1324.

- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Shenzhen)
- Flexible Electronics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)

- Atmospheric Science (Atmospheric, AI Dual Degree Program)
- Geographical Sciences

Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)

- Environmental Science and Engineering (including Yongluan Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1084–1324, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<1084), focus on aiming for top majors like Clinical Medicine; if the ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (>1324), prioritize Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

历年位次与招生计划.text: 2023–2025 minimum liberal arts ranking approximately 291→210→223, overall moving forward (easier to enter) in recent three years, with a significant jump to 210 in 2024 followed by a slight rebound to 223 in 2025; 2025 baseline approximately 223; enrollment plan in Xinjiang liberal arts was 8 in 2023, reduced to 6 in 2024, maintained at 6 in 2025; 2026 plan is 5, a reduction of about 17% from 2025, which typically makes the ranking number smaller (competition slightly eases).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sun Yat-sen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranked 13th (Top20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities; 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct and campus management public opinion, which may suppress application willingness to some extent; but 2025 reputation is somewhat positive, with Douyin popularity ranking 29th (relatively hot), overall attention is high; Sun Yat-sen University has a number of A-level humanities and social science disciplines such as Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literatures A-, Philosophy A-, Chinese History A-, Sociology A-, Law A-, Applied Economics A-, which are attractive to liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 223, the approximately 17% enrollment reduction in 2026, intensified competition due to the significant increase in total Xinjiang candidates, and the offsetting effect of the somewhat negative school reputation, it is expected that the 2026 minimum liberal arts ranking will move slightly forward (easier to enter) compared to 2025.
